what: Show Anthropic access status in Avatar (TopNav) and SettingsPage
why: Gives the user immediate visual feedback on whether their Anthropic account or API key is valid and active

decisions.reason: Green dot = has_anthropic_access true, red = false, pulsing-gray = check in progress
decisions.rationale: Anthropic access (not just CLI install) is the meaningful signal — user can have CLI installed but not logged in

decisions.reason: SettingsPage shows subscription_type badge and anthropic_email
decisions.rationale: Gives the user confidence that the correct account is active (e.g., 'max' tier vs 'free')

decisions.reason: SettingsPage shows two fix paths when unauthenticated: Claude CLI login or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
decisions.rationale: Either path gives valid Anthropic access; CLI is preferred (richer metadata), API key is the fallback
